title: Oil surges on Middle East tensions amid Iranian threat and Hormuz closure
summary: Attacks between Iran and the US push up oil prices and prompt Iraq and Syria to rebuild an alternative pipeline, amid fears of a military escalation.

summary: Elon Musk's company faces its worst streak since the IPO, with launch delays, critical reports, and growing competition from China.

title: Recession indicator and market drop warnings fuel fears on Wall Street
summary: The indicator that has anticipated all recessions since 1960 is triggered, while analysts like Martin Wolf warn of the next financial collapse.

title: US politics: House approves elimination of the penny, Trump promotes Gram's sister and his media company charges million-dollar fees
summary: Congress advances in eliminating the penny, Trump seeks to recruit Gram's sister for the elections, and Trump Media offers exclusive access to the president's posts for $100,000 a month.

title: Dividend ETF with 3.2% yield outperforms the Nasdaq-100 this year
summary: A dividend ETF offers a yield of 3.2% and is performing better than the tech index Nasdaq-100 so far this year.

summary: The electric company announces an ambitious investment plan that could translate into dividends for shareholders.

title: UBS projects space economy will reach $1.3 trillion by 2040
